title: Opinion: Opinion | Is Saudi Arabia Now Quietly Switching Sides In US-Iran War?
summary_full: The Saudi presence at the Ayatollah's funeral as well as its refusal to join America's 'Project Freedom' points to a quiet shift away from its ally, the US.
